summary: Contract editing feature verification - P0 task complete. Backend PUT /api/admin/contracts/{id}/update-fields works correctly. Frontend /contract/[id] page has 'Modifier le contrat' toggle that switches to edit mode with TextInput fields. Save persists data and reload shows updated values. Complete-contract page at /agency-app/complete-contract has always-editable form fields.
critical_code_review_comments: Contract edit toggle (data-testid='contract-edit-toggle') is implemented but not rendered as HTML attribute in React Native Web - works via CSS cursor:pointer detection

17 editable fields in contract view: vehicle_plate, vehicle_color, client_name, client_firstname, client_address, client_phone, client_email, client_nationality, client_dob, client_license, client_license_issued, client_license_valid, km_start, km_return, price_per_day, deposit, deductible
Signed contracts correctly return 400 when attempting edit (backend validation works)
Both /contract/[id] and /agency-app/complete-contract pages use same PUT endpoint for updates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract editing feature fully tested. Test contract ID 0728a2a2-5372-4dac-812a-e5c668f2548e (Contract N°20) used for verification. Data was reverted to original values after testing. Both edit pages work: /contract/[id] requires clicking 'Modifier le contrat' toggle, /agency-app/complete-contract?contract_id={id} has always-editable form. Login required for contract access.

backend_PUT_update_fields.details: PUT /api/admin/contracts/{id}/update-fields accepts editable fields, persists to DB, returns updated contract

backend_GET_contract.details: GET /api/contracts/{id} returns contract with contract_data containing all fields

backend_signed_contract_protection.details: Signed contracts return 400 'Cannot edit a signed contract' when attempting update

frontend_contract_view_modifier_button.details: 'Modifier le contrat' button visible at top of /contract/[id] page for draft contracts

frontend_edit_mode_toggle.details: Clicking toggle shows 'Mode edition' badge (yellow/orange) and switches to TextInput fields

frontend_sauvegarder_button.details: 'Sauvegarder' button appears at bottom in edit mode (green button)

frontend_data_persistence.details: Edited values persist after save and page reload - verified vehicle_plate changed from 'GE 6E750' to 'TEST-VD-999'

frontend_complete_contract_page.details: /agency-app/complete-contract?contract_id={id} shows always-editable form with 'Faire signer le client' button
